case_title: CITY CHIROPRACTIC CENTER VS HUISMAN ERIC

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUISMAN ERIC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,130.00 FILED BY CITY CHIROPRACTIC CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT HUISMAN ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY CHIROPRACTIC CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUISMAN ERIC $2,163.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,171.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
